programmes.show_description: A Patch, A Modem And A Zantac. After being dismissed in class, Sheldon is determined to prove a visiting NASA representative wrong and starts studying theoretical physics. S1, Ep6
A Brisket, Voodoo And Cannonball Run. Meemaw refuses to give George Sr. her brisket recipe. The kids try to think of ways to resolve this family feud. S1, Ep7
The Lipoma Whisperer. Melissa covered her huge lipoma with a sweatshirt for years. Tyler's fear of cancer stopped his head lumps being diagnosed and Tahj is covered in painful boils. S1, Ep2
Laura's Story. Laura has used food to cope with her emotions for too long. Confined to a wheelchair, she depends upon her husband and mother to survive. Can she turn her life around? S3, Ep8
Marla's Story. Marla is so heavy she cannot stand up. Bedridden, she must face the facts about her health and the toll it takes on her supportive family, if she is to save her health. S3, Ep9
From Snickers Bar To Caviar. Kerry's outrageous entourage keeps stealing her spotlight! Gretchen needs a gown all four of her sisters will love, and Alex questions her dress choice. S20, Ep1
Is Anyone Listening To Me? Kayla's family threatens to take over her appointment. Milan considers getting a customised dress. Prashanthi's fitting doesn't go according to plan. S20, Ep2
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Cape Canaveral. George takes his sons to see a space shuttle launch. Meanwhile, Mary, Meemaw and Missy have a girl's night at the salon. S1, Ep8
Spock, Kirk And Testicular Hernia. George Sr. makes a deal with Sheldon to tutor his brother when Georgie's poor grades threaten his place on the football team. S1, Ep9
Eagle Feather, String Bean. Sheldon interviews with a school for gifted children. Much to their surprise, the rest of the family struggle with his absence. S1, Ep10
Demons, Sunday School. A worried Mary sends Sheldon to Sunday school after she finds him playing Dungeons & Dragons with Tam and Billy. S1, Ep11
A Computer, A Plastic Pony. Sheldon asking for a computer has unforeseen consequences for his parents, prompting Mary and the twins to move in with Meemaw. S1, Ep12
A Sneeze, Detention. Sheldon's germophobia lands him in detention when flu season hits Medford and he takes extreme measures to remain healthy. S1, Ep13
The White Asparagus Triangulation. Sheldon is over-exuberant that Leonard finally has a girlfriend matching his high standards. S2, Ep9
The Vartabedian Conundrum. Leonard seeks Penny's counsel when his relationship with Stephanie takes. Sheldon's hypochondriac tendencies get the better of him. S2, Ep10
The Bath Item Gift Hypothesis. Sheldon irks the gangs with his obsession with proper Christmas gift protocol. Leonard's crushed when Penny dates a colleague of his. S2, Ep11
The Killer Robot Instability. Penny's criticism of Wolowitz's romantic life pushes him into depression and AWOL for a fighting robot battle the guys are depending on him for. S2, Ep12
The Friendship Algorithim. Looking to get friendly with Barry Kripke to gain access to a piece of high-tech lab equipment, Sheldon develops a flowchart process to make friends. S2, Ep13
The Financial Permeability. When Sheldon loans money to Penny so she can pay her rent, it leads to Leonard coming face-to-face with her ex, Kurt. S2, Ep14
The Maternal Capacitance. A visit from Leonard's mother ends up bringing him and Penny closer. S2, Ep15
The Cushion Saturation. Paintball leads to a squabble between Sheldon and Penny as well as romance between Howard and Leslie. S2, Ep16
The Terminator Decoupling. The gang is thrilled to see Summer Glau is also aboard their train to San Francisco. Sheldon frets over having forgotten a paper he wants to present. S2, Ep17
The Work Song Nanocluster. Penny's business selling hair accessories out of her apartment gets out of hand when an over-caffeinated Sheldon takes charge. S2, Ep18
The Dead Hooker Juxtaposition. Penny feels threatened when another sexy woman moves into the apartment building and angered when she senses the guys are being taken advantage of. S2, Ep19
The Hofstadter Isotope. A fellow comic book enthusiast's hitting on Penny leads to Leonard, Raj and Howard going to a bar's Ladies' Night. S2, Ep20
The Vegas Renormalization. Leonard and Raj take Wolowitz to Las Vegas to help him get over his break-up. Sheldon locks himself out and has only one other place to stay: Penny's. S2, Ep21
Classified Material Turbulence. Stuart asks Leonard's advice for a date with Penny. Wolowitz realises there's an error in a toilet he designed for the International Space Station. S2, Ep22
The Monopolar Expedition. The guys receive a prestigious offer to work over the summer at the North Pole, and Penny's resultant behaviour leaves Leonard unsure if he should go. S2, Ep23
The Electric Can Opener. Discovering Leonard, Raj and Howard fudged the results of his Arctic research expedition, a disgraced Sheldon heads home to Texas. S3, Ep1
The Jiminy Conjecture. Sheldon and Howard wager comic books over a cricket's species. Meanwhile, a less-than-perfect romantic night agonizes Leonard and Penny. S3, Ep2
The Gothowitz Deviation. Howard takes Raj along to check out the Goth dating scene. Sheldon uses chocolate as part of a behaviour modification experiment on Penny. S3, Ep3
The Pirate Solution. Facing a return to India, Raj needs a job desperately enough to consider working for Sheldon. Howard becomes a third wheel to Leonard and Penny. S3, Ep4
Creepy Candy Coating Corollary. Sheldon looks forward to squaring off against a Star Trek actor in a fantasy card game tournament. Wolowitz cashes in on an old pact with Leonard. S3, Ep5
Goddess Of The Music Store. Georgie helps Connor impress his new crush, while Mandy, Audrey and Jim struggle to butt out of Connor's love life. S1, Ep15
Baby Fight! Georgie and Mandy worry they're not on the same page when they disagree about having another kid, and Mary, Jim and Audrey struggle to stay out of it. S1, Ep16
Dara Ó Briain hosts more laughter filled game play with guests Rhys James, Angela Barnes, Sarah Keyworth, Glenn Moore, Milton Jones and Ahir Shah. S1, Ep6
Dara Ó Briain introduces topical chat and laugh out loud games with guests Rhys James, Ed Byrne, Glenn Moore, Sara Pascoe and Emmanuel Sonubi. S1, Ep5
Bright Ideas. Guz transforms his S2000 with new lights and under glow, jumps into a turbo Micra thrill ride, and explores bold builds from across the modding world. S1, Ep7
Potato Salad, A Broomstick. When Mary takes a job at the church, Sheldon and Missy are left home alone for the very first time. S1, Ep14
The World's Largest Lump. Ronen has a huge but mysterious lump above his knee. Meanwhile Amber is suffering from a debilitating skin disease no one understands. S1, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta
programmes.show_description: Southern Mamas Are Hard Y'All. Holly wants to look like a princess but her mum and grandma have another vision. Plus, Lauren has yet to lay eyes on her custom-made ball gown. S2, Ep8
Chay's Story. To cope with the emotional turmoil of his childhood, 23-year-old Chay has eaten his way to 600-lbs - and it's threatening to kill him before turning 30. S3, Ep10
Nikki's Story. Lifelong secret eater Nikki is threatened by immobility as her weight climbs to 650-lbs. She has a gastric bypass and confronts the emotional causes for her eating. S4, Ep1
Diva With A Capital D. Emerald tries to convince her mum to let her double her dress budget! Singer Jillian looks to her dad for approval and Elaina's returns for her fitting. S20, Ep3
Get Along And Get This Dress. Liana heads to Kleinfeld to find a dress for her wedding that's only four months away. Meredith wants a dress that gives her that fairy-tale feeling. S20, Ep4
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Super Cop. Mike becomes hyper-vigilant after his wallet is stolen from the squad car while taking a nap. S6, Ep4
Joyce's Will Be Done. Molly is shocked when Joyce reveals she's leaving the house to Victoria in her will. S6, Ep5
The Good Wife. Molly's leisure activities between novels become an issue for Mike. Tensions rise as he wants her to be the perfect homemaker. S6, Ep6
A Computer, A Plastic Pony. Sheldon asking for a computer has unforeseen consequences for his parents, prompting Mary and the twins to move in with Meemaw. S1, Ep12
A Sneeze, Detention. Sheldon's germophobia lands him in detention when flu season hits Medford and he takes extreme measures to remain healthy. S1, Ep13

Weekend With Birdie. Mike is excited to bring a new stray dog into the home. But Molly isn't so sure and has trouble warming up to the new family member. S6, Ep7
The Wreck Of The Vincent Moranto. Despite promising to work together, Vince bails on finishing a do-it-yourself project with Mike. S6, Ep8
Baby, Please Don't Go. Molly learns that a former student is not only pregnant but homeless. When she brings her home, family and friends are concerned. S6, Ep9
Dolomite, Apple Slices. Sheldon makes a new friend who introduces him to a new field of science, while his parents disagree on how to handle Sheldon's blossoming social life. S1, Ep15
Killer Asteroids, Oklahoma. A disappointing loss at the science fair sparks an existential crisis and sends Sheldon's life in a new direction. S1, Ep16
Jiu-Jitsu, Bubble Wrap. When Sheldon is bullied by an unlikely character, Mary and George disagree on how to handle the situation. S1, Ep17
The Cornhusker Vortex. Hoping to fit in with Penny's football-loving friends, Leonard gets tutored in the sport by Sheldon. Raj is furious over the loss of his patang. S3, Ep6
The Guitarist Amplification. Leonard and Penny's first big fight sees Sheldon playing mediator due to childhood trauma that means he can't be around loud verbal conflicts. S3, Ep7
The Vengeance Formulation. Barry Kripke pranks Sheldon during his spot on NPR, leaving him wanting vengeance. Bernadette pressures Wolowitz to define their relationship. S3, Ep9
The Gorilla Experiment. Penny seeks Sheldon's help to better comprehend Leonard's physics work. Wolowitz sees green when Leonard invites Bernadette to watch an experiment. S3, Ep10
The Maternal Congruence. A Christmas visit from his mother has Leonard discovering she's kept a lot of news from him that she shares with Sheldon. S3, Ep11
The Psychic Vortex. Leonard is aghast to find out that Penny believes in psychics. Sheldon tries to assist Koothrappali in picking up a girl at a university party. S3, Ep12
The Bozeman Reaction. A robbery of their apartment sees Leonard and Sheldon call on their friends to devise a security system. S3, Ep13
The Einstein Approximation. Stuck on the solution to a physics problem, Sheldon tries different methods to change his thinking, including working at The Cheesecake Factory. S3, Ep14

programmes.show_name: New: The Rocky Mountain Mortician Murder
programmes.show_description: Brothers, Sons And Lovers. A beloved funeral director's murder exposes several shocking suspects, including his grandson, handyman, and two local celebrity brothers. S1, Ep1

programmes.show_name: New: The Rocky Mountain Mortician Murder
programmes.show_description: Closets Hide Skeletons. Investigators expose secrets about the brothers, including a secret affair. The revelation sparks a rageful confession - and causes another death. S1, Ep2

programmes.show_name: New: The Rocky Mountain Mortician Murder
programmes.show_description: Burying The Guilty. The murder trial begins, and a new investigator uncovers surprising new leads. A shocking court outcome sparks outrage. S1, Ep3
